archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) infused with Archetype 4 (Swiss/High-Contrast) for enterprise precision

headings.usage: Use Outfit for all display text and section titles. Tightly tracked (tracking-tight) for large text.

body.usage: Use IBM Plex Sans for legibility in dense data areas, paragraphs, and body copy. Relaxed line height (leading-relaxed).

rules: Large headings (text-5xl+) must use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Hierarchy gap rule: Jump between heading and sub-heading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.
Use #040914 as the core void background. Do not use pure #000000.
Use Bright Cyan (#00D1E9) for critical CTAs and active interactive states.
Use Orange/Red (#F76F2E) for accents, alerts, specific chart lines, or dramatic highlights.
Glassmorphism must have a 1px border-white/10 to optically separate from the background.

layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid for Services and Case Studies (asymmetric spans, gap-8 to gap-12).
rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-8 or p-12).
Mobile-first: grid-cols-1, then md:grid-cols-4 or md:grid-cols-8 for asymmetrical tension.
Border radius: Use max 8px (rounded-lg) for a premium, sharp enterprise feel.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass - bg-[#0A162B]/70, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/10, saturate-150.
surfaces.cards: Flat background bg-[#0A162B], 1px subtle border border-white/10, hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#1F7D9F]/50.
surfaces.floating_widgets: Neumorphism / Glassmorphism mix for orbiting dashboard widgets. High-end glass, 1px delicate inner stroke.

motion_and_interaction.smooth_scroll: Lenis is MANDATORY. Standard browser scrolling is not allowed.
motion_and_interaction.scroll_animations: GSAP + ScrollTrigger for the main scroll story (Chaos -> Intelligence). Staggered text reveals.
motion_and_interaction.3d_scene: React Three Fiber (R3F) + Drei for the Data Core Sphere. Use <Environment> and <Float> for premium depth.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All buttons must have explicit hover states increasing contrast (e.g., hover:bg-[#00D1E9] hover:text-[#040914]).

images.description: Founder dramatic portrait with orange/black background
Background graphic for transition or case studies section

specific_functionalities.navigation: Sticky Navbar with Logo, Nav links, EN/ID language toggle. Must be z-50.
specific_functionalities.hero: Left side: Headline 'Tajam Melihat, Sigap Bertindak' with high contrast typography. Right side: R3F Canvas showing a glowing 3D sphere. Floating Recharts data cards orbiting the sphere.
specific_functionalities.scroll_story: GSAP ScrollTrigger mapping 'Chaos -> Integration -> Intelligence -> Decision'. Pin the section and animate text opacity and background gradients based on scroll progress.
specific_functionalities.services_grid: 7-service bento grid. Use 'The Tetris Grid' rule. 3 column layout, span-2 for featured, span-1 for others. Use hover glow tracing beam effects.
specific_functionalities.trust_metrics: Animated counters triggered by GSAP when in view. 5+ years, 300+ outlets, 750+ users, 23 branches, 100M+ rows.
specific_functionalities.case_studies: 5 cards displaying abstract AI-generated images provided in assets, focusing on target audience sectors.
specific_functionalities.founder: Dramatic portrait photo layout, dark orange/black backdrop, bio, achievements.
specific_functionalities.contact_cta: Integration of Cal.com free embed, Email display, WhatsApp floating action buttons.
specific_functionalities.floating_action_buttons: Fixed bottom-right WhatsApp and Book Meeting buttons. Use z-50 and backdrop blur.

testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All buttons, inputs, links, language toggles, and forms MUST include descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., 'hero-cta-button', 'whatsapp-fab', 'language-toggle').
instructions_to_main_agent: Write code for standard React (.js/.jsx), NO NEXT.JS. NO Typescript.
Initialize tailwind with the provided custom colors: #040914, #0A162B, #0D3A70, #1F7D9F, #00D1E9, #F76F2E.
Integrate GSAP + ScrollTrigger for the storytelling scroll animations.
Integrate lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layout to ensure asymmetry; avoid restrictive wrapper components.
Fetch provided image URLs directly from the assets section in this guideline. Do NOT use placeholders.
